{"society_power": 4.0, "state_power": 4.0, "society_change": -1.0, "state_change": 1.5, "key_event": "Regeneraci\u00f3n and 1886 centralist Constitution", "reasoning": "N\u00fa\u00f1ez's Regeneraci\u00f3n, the Banco Nacional, defeat of the 1885 Radical uprising, and the 1886 Constitution abolishing sovereign states markedly strengthened central state capacity, while abolishing regional autonomy and empowering only the Church (not pluralistic civil society) curtailed autonomous societal power."}
